title: Datagrid action triggers form submission
symptom: Clicking any action in the datagrid submits the entire form, even without workflows defined. This behavior complicates form validation and layout.
applies_when: Action buttons in the datagrid are not defined with a type
not_this_if: Action buttons have a defined type
root_cause: When a button inside a form does not have a defined type, it defaults to 'submit', causing the form to submit when the button is clicked. This is a common behavior in HTML forms.
agent_instruction: Fork the datagrid component and set the button type to 'button' in ActionCellRenderer.vue.
